## Summary

Fix the async evaluation pipeline infinite requeue loop caused by Track C completion not writing `pass3a_status` + `pass3a_completed_at` to top-level progress JSON. Also fixes the coarse progress bar (was 3-unit, now 100-unit phase-weighted) and adds a hard 2-hour kill switch for runaway jobs.

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECK EXACTLY ONE — Pass 2 pre-checked as default):

- [x] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files:

- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — Track C done/degraded writes, self-chain progress preservation, markRunning scale
- `app/api/workers/process-evaluations/route.ts` — 2-hour kill switch enforcement

Out of scope:

- Phase 2/3B/WAVE execution logic unchanged
- Review Gate validation logic unchanged (gate is correct; Track C wasn't writing what it requires)
- Frontend/UI code unchanged (progress bar fix is server-side)
- Database schema unchanged

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: yes

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):

- Track C completion now writes gate-required metadata (`pass3a_status`, `pass3a_completed_at`, `pass3a_artifact_id`) to top-level progress JSON so the Review Gate no longer blocks with `PASS3A_COMPLETION_METADATA_MISSING`.
- Self-chain preserves these fields so they survive to the next invocation.
- In-memory `progressState` updated via `Object.assign` so same-invocation Review Gate check sees correct state (small manuscripts completing all chunks in one batch).
- No phase ordering changes. No gate logic changes. No new phases.

## Contract Integrity

- Gate validation logic in `gateValidity.ts` is unchanged — the gate was correct, Track C was not fulfilling the contract.
- `pass3a_completed_at` is now written as ISO string (gate requires `isNonEmptyString`).
- Kill switch adds a new `MAX_AGE_KILL_SWITCH` failure code — no existing codes changed.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

The fix ensures evaluations complete instead of cycling forever. No prompt changes, no scoring logic changes, no model changes. Progress bar is cosmetic (total_units/completed_units ratio).

## Latency Evidence

### Baseline (Pre-change)

| Run | pass1_ms | total_ms | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Run 1 | N/A | N/A | Jobs never complete — infinite requeue at Review Gate |
| Run 2 | N/A | N/A | Same — `PASS3A_COMPLETION_METADATA_MISSING` blocks forever |

### Post-change Runs

| Run | pass1_ms | total_ms | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Run 1 | N/A | N/A | Fix is metadata write — no latency impact (single DB update) |
| Run 2 | N/A | N/A | Kill switch adds one SELECT before processing (~5ms) |

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_PASS3A_COMPLETION_METADATA_MISSING: This gate was triggering incorrectly due to missing metadata write — now resolved. No QG behavior changes.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- `EVALUATION_PROGRESS_TOTAL_UNITS` changed from 3 → 100. In-flight jobs with old value will self-correct on next progress write.
- Kill switch queries up to 20 stale jobs per worker tick — bounded and non-blocking.
- `Object.assign(progressState, ...)` mutates shared state intentionally so same-invocation downstream code sees updated fields.
